_comment: Each KPI keeps its display policy here (category, thresholds, mood flag, action prompt, owner usernames). The LIVE count + oldest_age_days are pulled from the Monday 'Daily KPI Tracker' board (id 18416416116) by matching monday_item_id — see data_sources.py. If the Monday token isn't set, these saved numbers are used as a fallback. Status: green if count<=target; amber if count<=amber_max; red above. Age escalates status past age_amber / age_red. mood_impact=true feeds the customer-mood score.

kpis.name: New orders to process
kpis.source: Monday · New orders to send to suppliers
kpis.action: Send the outstanding POs to suppliers — work oldest first.

kpis.name: To post
kpis.action: Print labels and hand to the courier before the 3pm collection.

kpis.name: ETAs to chase (unconfirmed)
kpis.source: Monday · Unconfirmed orders – call for ETA
kpis.action: Chase suppliers for delivery dates; update customers still waiting.

kpis.name: Booked — ETA in the past
kpis.source: Monday · Booked, customer ETA in past
kpis.action: These should have arrived — confirm delivery or re-book urgently.

kpis.name: Booked — ETA today / future
kpis.source: Monday · Booked, ETA today or future
kpis.action: On track — monitor for any slipping into the overdue list.

kpis.name: Complaints / escalations
kpis.action: Resolve the oldest escalation first — these carry the highest customer-frustration risk.

kpis.name: Difficult orders (awaiting customer)
kpis.action: Follow up the oldest case today before it escalates further.

kpis.name: Pre-delivery queries
kpis.action: Answer queries before dispatch to avoid cancellations.

kpis.name: Accepted returns
kpis.action: Process refunds / replacements; the oldest return is badly overdue.

kpis.name: Active chargebacks
kpis.action: Submit evidence before the bank deadline — each one is real money.

kpis.name: Invoices to approve
kpis.action: Comfortable up to 350; above that Malyeka is over and could use a hand on approvals.

kpis.name: Invoice discrepancies
kpis.action: Query the leading suppliers; this backlog is tying up cash.

kpis.name: Outstanding quotes & new orders
kpis.action: Follow up quotes — these are sales waiting to be won.
